Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\kmanchikanti\\Desktop\\code\\ogkranthi.github.io" && gh pr create --title "feat: auto-update featured post on every publish" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds a GitHub Action \(`.github/workflows/update-featured.yml`\) that triggers on push to main when HTML files change
- Adds a Python script \(`.github/scripts/update-featured.py`\) that parses the newest post card from the grid, reads the post's `<h2>` headings as takeaways, and rewrites the featured section and post count in `index.html`
- Updates the currently stale featured tile from the old Engram post to the latest Governed Agent Distribution post

## How it works
1. Copilot merges a PR with a new blog post + card in the grid
2. Push to main triggers the `update-featured` workflow
3. Script detects the first card in the grid \(newest post\), compares against the current featured href
4. If different, it reads the post HTML for h2 headings, rebuilds the featured section, and updates the post count
5. Commits via `github-actions[bot]` \(won't re-trigger workflows\)

## Test plan
- [x] Ran script locally — featured tile updated correctly from Engram to Governed Agent Distribution
- [ ] Verify workflow runs on merge and commits the update

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
